title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited:
IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited!
